---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for the library, CLI, docs, or contributor experience
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Markdown Or DOCX Example

If relevant, include a markdown input sample or describe the expected DOCX output.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add anything else that would help evaluate the request.
